expectations.text: Correctly targets the Ingredient interface (not RecipeSnapshot or SavedRecipe) as the location to add allergenTags
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'The field belongs on the Ingredient interface' and adds allergenTags to Ingredient, not RecipeSnapshot/SavedRecipe. Notes 'Do not add this to RecipeSnapshot or SavedRecipe directly'

expectations.text: Makes field optional (allergenTags?: string[]) to preserve backward compatibility
expectations.evidence: Uses allergenTags?: string[] and explicitly explains 'Make it optional so existing persisted data loads without error — no migration required'

expectations.text: Correctly names the localStorage key as 'sourdough_recipes' (not 'bakeryos_recipes' or 'recipes')
expectations.evidence: States 'Recipes are stored under sourdough_recipes as SavedRecipe[]' and 'sourdough_recipes must not be renamed (legacy key per the skill reference)'

expectations.text: Notes that both flours and ingredients arrays on RecipeSnapshot contain Ingredient objects
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'Ingredient is shared by both flours and ingredients arrays inside every RecipeSnapshot' and 'Both flours and ingredients arrays on RecipeSnapshot contain Ingredient objects, so allergen tags will flow through both'
